serverInfo.name: invinoveritas
serverInfo.description: Lightning-paid reasoning and decision intelligence for autonomous agents. Pay-per-insight via L402 (Bitcoin Lightning). No accounts, no subscriptions.

authentication.notes: Uses the L402 protocol. POST to an endpoint to receive an HTTP 402 with a bolt11 Lightning invoice. Pay it, then retry with: Authorization: L402 <payment_hash>:<preimage>

tools.name: reason
tools.description: Strategic reasoning via natural language. Provide a question and receive a detailed, thoughtful answer. Cost: ~500-700 satoshis per request.

question.description: The question or topic to reason about

tools.name: decision
tools.description: Structured decision intelligence. Provide a goal, context, and question. Returns a JSON object with decision, confidence score (0-1), reasoning, and risk level. Cost: ~1000-1200 satoshis per request.

context.description: Relevant background information or current state

question.description: The specific decision question to answer
